subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that hath been sent down from the heaven of the will of the All-Merciful unto all who dwell within the realm of possibility [3.5s]... ...By the one true God, Elijah hath hastened unto My court and hath circumambulated
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل من سماء مشیة الرحمن علی من فی الامکان ... یا ایلیا اراضی جرزه لایق بذر حکمت الهی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power of prayer, @prophecy and fulfillment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
